channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Vacuum Seal Your MongoDB: Cuts Cost Down 50% Today
item.description: This article was written by Darshan Jayarama. I was recently packing for a short trip, and I personally hate carrying 2–3 pieces of luggage. One for my laptop, another for clothes. So a person...

item.title: VS Code extension that compiles structured prompts — no AI calls, no API keys
item.description: What I Built Pup is a VS Code extension that treats your prompt like source code — you fill a form, it compiles to whatever format your model prefers. The insight behind it: LLMs aren't all...

item.title: Google DeepMind workers are unionizing over AI military contracts
item.description: Staffers at Google DeepMind's headquarters have voted to unionize in an effort to prevent the AI firm's technology from being used by Israel and the US military. In a letter to Google management...

item.title: Five Interface Shifts Already Pointing to How Digital Products Will Feel in 2026
item.description: Five Interface Shifts Already Pointing to How Digital Products Will Feel in 2026 Five Interface Shifts Already Pointing to How Digital Products Will Feel in 2026 Researched and written on May 5,...

item.title: I built a form builder that lives inside your AI chat
item.description: Context switching is the thing that kills me. I'm mid-conversation with Claude, figuring something out, and then I need to collect responses from a few people. So I open Typeform in another tab,...

item.title: (Vidéo) 2 méthodes pour survivre en Rust sans héritage
item.description: Tout le monde sait maintenant. Rust est un langage de développement natif et moderne. Et pourtant il ne contient pas d'héritage à proprement parler 🫢 Je vous explique pourquoi, et surtout comment...

item.title: Five UI Patterns That Already Make 2026 Feel Different
item.description: Five UI Patterns That Already Make 2026 Feel Different Five UI Patterns That Already Make 2026 Feel Different Prepared on May 5, 2026. Thesis The clearest UI/UX shift heading into 2026 is not...

item.title: AI Broke Data Engineering Interviews. Nobody Knows What's Next.
item.description: I've been on both sides of the data engineering hiring table for years. I've written interview loops, failed interview loops, and watched candidates ace screens that told me absolutely nothing...

item.title: 30-Day Study Plan to Master Generative AI on AWS
item.description: Generative AI is no longer just an emerging technology. It is becoming a core business capability across software development, customer support, analytics, content generation, automation,...

item.title: ElevenLabs Conversational AI survey bot — reducing latency and robotic feel, plus initial delay issue
item.description: Building a Czech-language outbound market research survey bot on ElevenLabs Conversational AI. Current setup: STT: Scribe v2.2 Realtime model LLM: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B model, As per the 11labs portal,...

item.title: 🥊 Boxea bien. El knock-out viene solo
item.description: 🚀 Cerrar un ciclo (y abrir otro) Lo prometido es deuda. Este blog nació como una necesidad personal. Un desahogo. Una forma de dejar constancia de todo lo que voy atravesando en este cambio...

item.title: He Couldn’t Land a Job Interview. Was AI to Blame?
item.description: Armed with some Python and a white-hot sense of injustice, one medical student spent six months trying to figure out whether an algorithm trashed his job application.

item.title: Microsoft is finally ditching the junk MSN feed in Windows widgets
item.description: Microsoft is finally giving up on showing the junk feed of MSN news when you open the widgets feature in Windows 11. After allowing Windows 11 users to disable the MSN feed more than two years...

item.title: ScarCruft Hacks Gaming Platform to Deploy BirdCall Malware on Android and Windows
item.description: The North Korea-aligned state-sponsored hacking group known as ScarCruft has compromised a video game platform in a supply chain espionage attack, trojanizing its components with a backdoor called...

item.title: A blueprint for using AI to strengthen democracy
item.description: Every few centuries, changes in how information moves reshape how societies govern themselves. The printing press spread vernacular literacy, helping give rise to the Reformation and, eventually,...

item.title: Weaver E-cology RCE Flaw CVE-2026-22679 Actively Exploited via Debug API
item.description: A critical security vulnerability in Weaver (Fanwei) E-cology, an enterprise office automation (OA) and collaboration platform, has come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability...

item.title: Microsoft Details Phishing Campaign Targeting 35,000 Users Across 26 Countries
item.description: Microsoft has disclosed details of a large-scale credential theft campaign that has leveraged a combination of code of conduct-themed lures and legitimate email services to direct users to...

item.title: As workers worry about AI, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says AI is ‘creating an enormous number of jobs’
item.description: The Nvidia CEO seems to feel that claims of AI's job-killing potential have been greatly exaggerated.

item.title: The 40 best Mother’s Day gift ideas for 2026
item.description: Whether it's managing a busy home or looking out for everyone around them, moms spend a lot of time every day caring for others. Mother's Day, May 10th, is an opportunity to return the favor, so...

item.title: Valve just imported 50 tons of game consoles in two days
item.description: We still don't know when Valve will launch the Steam Machine, but we may not have to wait too long. Valve just imported roughly 50 tons of "Game Consoles" into the United States in the two-day...

item.title: OpenAI’s president does ‘all the things,’ except answer a question
item.description: The strongest witness for Elon Musk's case against OpenAI so far has been Greg Brockman's journal. Brockman himself is running as a close second. Brockman was called to the stand in a rather...

item.title: Greg Brockman Defends $30B OpenAI Stake: ‘Blood, Sweat, and Tears’
item.description: OpenAI’s cofounder and president revealed in federal court on Monday that he’s one of the largest individual stakeholders in the AI lab.

item.title: Elon Musk will settle the feds’ Twitter lawsuit with pocket change
item.description: Last year, the SEC sued Elon Musk over the way his acquisition of Twitter (now X, and a part of SpaceX) started, and today it announced a settlement that looks like a massive bargain, while Musk's...

item.title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
item.description: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

item.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
item.description: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.

item.title: Skylight’s 15-inch smart calendar is down to its lowest price to date
item.description: When you’re juggling more than just your own calendar, staying organized can be overwhelming. Fortunately, the Skylight Calendar 2 can help simplify things by syncing multiple calendars in a...

item.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
item.description: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

item.title: SwitchBot’s rechargeable button pusher is on sale for over 20 percent off
item.description: If you want to give mom something that helps lighten the load, the SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable makes for a great, inexpensive gift. And now through May 10th, you can buy it for around $26.99 ($7...

item.title: Phishing Campaign Hits 80+ Orgs Using SimpleHelp and ScreenConnect RMM Tools
item.description: An active phishing campaign has been observed targeting multiple vectors since at least April 2025 with legitimate Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) software as a way to establish persistent...

item.title: GameStop offers $56 billion for eBay, struggles to explain how it'll pay for it
item.description: Amid falling revenue and store closures, GameStop wants to buy the much larger eBay.
